title: viola × kupfferiana
intro: Viola × kupfferiana, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola × sororia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Viola × kupfferiana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Viola × kupfferiana are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and may be used to soothe digestive issues and promote skin health.
